title: Knight Frank India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Knight Frank India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!
